code: import{configureStore}from'@reduxjs/toolkit';import cartReducer from'./slices/cartslice';import productReducer from'./slices/productslice';import authReducer from'./slices/authslice';import orderReducer from'./slices/orderslice';export const store=configureStore({reducer:{cart:cartReducer,products:productReducer,auth:authReducer,orders:orderReducer},middleware:getDefaultMiddleware=>getDefaultMiddleware({serializableCheck:{ignoredActions:['auth/setUser']}})});
